reviewer_title: surveyor: remove dead tokmd-config microcrate and unused fuzz deps 🧭
summary: Removed the `tokmd-config` microcrate completely, as it was just a dead facade. Migrated its extensive test suite into `tokmd-settings`. Updated `xtask` boundary rules to target `tokmd-settings` instead. Cleaned up unused dependencies in `tokmd-fuzz`.
proof_summary: Extensive test migrations pass fully under `cargo test -p tokmd-settings`. `cargo xtask boundaries-check` passes. `cargo machete` reports zero unused dependencies.
